lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਹਿ ਬਲੰਦੜੀ ਬੁਝਿ ਗਈ ਰਖੰਦੜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaeh balandarree bujh gee rakhandarro prabh aap |
lines.english: The burning fire has been put out; God Himself has saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਪਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin upaaee medanee naanak so prabh jaap |2|
lines.english: Meditate on that God, O Nanak, who created the universe. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਘਾ ਗਏ ਨਾਸ ਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kott aghaa ge naas har ik dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Millions of sins are eliminated, by meditating on the Naam, the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa prabh bhe deaal na biaapai maaeaa |
lines.english: When God becomes merciful, Maya does not cling.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਭਏ ਸਰੀਰ ਜਨ ਧੂਰੀ ਨਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: niramal bhe sareer jan dhooree naaeaa |
lines.english: The body is made immaculate and pure, bathing in the dust of the feet of the Lord's humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਭਏ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man tan bhe santokh pooran prabh paaeaa |
lines.english: The mind and body become contented, finding the Perfect Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰੇ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸੰਗਿ ਲੋਗ ਕੁਲ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: tare kuttanb sang log kul sabaaeaa |18|
lines.english: One is saved, along with his family, and all his ancestors. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੁਰ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰਨ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: gur gobind gopaal gur gur pooran naaraaeinah |
lines.english: The Guru is the Lord of the Universe; the Guru is the Lord of the world; the Guru is the Perfect Pervading Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਦਇਆਲ ਸਮਰਥ ਗੁਰ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur deaal samarath gur gur naanak patit udhaaranah |1|
lines.english: The Guru is compassionate; the Guru is all-powerful; the Guru, O Nanak, is the Saving Grace of sinners. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਅਸਗਾਹੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਬੋਹਿਥੈ ਤਾਰਿਅਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaujal bikham asagaahu gur bohithai taariam |
lines.english: The Guru is the boat, to cross over the dangerous, treacherous, unfathomable world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰ ਕਰੰਮ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak poor karam satigur charanee lagiaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by perfect good karma, one is attached to the feet of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਜਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan guradev jis sang har jape |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the Divine Guru; associating with Him, one meditates on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਜਬ ਭਏ ਤ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਸਭਿ ਛਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kripaal jab bhe ta avagun sabh chhape |
lines.english: When the Guru becomes merciful, then all one's demerits are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਨੀਚਹੁ ਉਚ ਥਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham guradev neechahu uch thape |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Divine Guru, uplifts and exalts the lowly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੇ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: gun gaae beant rasanaa har jase |19|
lines.english: With my tongue, I sing the Glorious Praises of the infinite Lord God. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟਿ ਸਿਲਕ ਦੁਖ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਅਪ ਦਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaatt silak dukh maaeaa kar leene ap dase |
lines.english: Cutting away the painful noose of Maya, He makes us His own slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰਤ ਏਕੋ ਸੁਨੀਅੰਤ ਏਕੋ ਵਰਤੰਤ ਏਕੋ ਨਰਹਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: drisattant eko suneeant eko varatant eko naraharah |
lines.english: I see only the One Lord; I hear only the One Lord; the One Lord is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਜਾਚੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam daan jaachant naanak deaal purakh kripaa karah |1|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the gift of the Naam; O Merciful Lord God, please grant Your Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਵਖਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam vakhar dhan sanchiaa naanak sachee raas |2|
lines.english: Nanak has gathered in the wealth, the merchandise of the Naam; this is the true capital. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਹਿਕੁ ਸੰਮਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: hik sevee hik samalaa har ikas peh aradaas |
lines.english: I serve the One Lord, I contemplate the One Lord, and to the One Lord, I offer my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਇਆਲ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਇਕੁ ਏਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh deaal beant pooran ik ehu |
lines.english: God is merciful and infinite. The One and Only is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਕਹਾ ਕੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap doojaa kahaa kehu |
lines.english: He Himself is all-in-all. Who else can we speak of?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap karahu prabh daan aape aap lehu |
lines.english: God Himself grants His gifts, and He Himself receives them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਥੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa hukam sabh nihachal tudh thehu |
lines.english: Coming and going are all by the Hukam of Your Will; Your place is steady and unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹੁ ॥੨੦॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mangai daan kar kirapaa naam dehu |20|1|
lines.english: Nanak begs for this gift; by Your Grace, Lord, please grant me Your Name. ||20||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree baanee bhagataa kee |
lines.english: Jaitsree, The Word Of The Devotees:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਕਹੀਅਤ ਹੌ ਜਗਤ ਗੁਰ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: tum kaheeat hau jagat gur suaamee |
lines.english: You are called the Lord and Master, the Guru of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਬਿਕਾਨਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man maaeaa kai haath bikaanau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind has sold out, and is in Maya's hands. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਥ ਕਛੂਅ ਨ ਜਾਨਉ ॥
lines.translit: naath kachhooa na jaanau |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, I know nothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਕਹੀਅਤ ਕਲਿਜੁਗ ਕੇ ਕਾਮੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ham kaheeat kalijug ke kaamee |1|
lines.english: I am called a lustful being of the Dark Age of Kali Yuga. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਪੰਚਨ ਮੇਰੋ ਮਨੁ ਜੁ ਬਿਗਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: ein panchan mero man ju bigaario |
lines.english: The five vices have corrupted my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲੁ ਪਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਤੇ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਪਾਰਿਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pal pal har jee te antar paario |2|
lines.english: Moment by moment, they lead me further away from the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜੌਂ ਨ ਪਤੵਾਇ ਨਿਗਮ ਭਏ ਸਾਖੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ajauan na patayaae nigam bhe saakhee |3|
lines.english: I do not have faith, even though the Vedas bear witness to the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਤਮ ਨਾਰਿ ਉਮਾਪਤਿ ਸ੍ਵਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: gotam naar umaapat svaamee |
lines.english: Shiva cut off Brahma's head, and Gautam's wife and the Lord Indra mated;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਤ ਦੁਖ ਕੀ ਰਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jat dekhau tat dukh kee raasee |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see loads of pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਦੂਤਨ ਖਲੁ ਬਧੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: ein dootan khal badh kar maario |
lines.english: These demons have fooled, bound and destroyed me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡੋ ਨਿਲਾਜੁ ਅਜਹੂ ਨਹੀ ਹਾਰਿਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: baddo nilaaj ajahoo nahee haario |5|
lines.english: I am very shameless - even now, I am not tired of them. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਸੁ ਧਰਨਿ ਸਹਸ ਭਗ ਗਾਂਮੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sees dharan sehas bhag gaamee |4|
lines.english: Brahma's head got stuck to Shiva's hand, and Indra came to bear the marks of a thousand female organs. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਕਹਾ ਕੈਸੇ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: keh ravidaas kahaa kaise keejai |
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, what am I to do now?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਰਘੁਨਾਥ ਸਰਨਿ ਕਾ ਕੀ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੬॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin raghunaath saran kaa kee leejai |6|1|
lines.english: Without the Sanctuary of the Lord's Protection, who else's should I seek? ||6||1||
